phase_13_1_alignment: Phase 13.1 implements the cockpit-native voice/text command surface that cortextOS Phase 13 calls for. Operator speaks or types, DEX interprets and returns structured previews. No execution without approval. This is the foundation for Phase 13.2+ (live execution with approval gates).
remaining_for_phase_13_2_plus: Approval flow UI (approve/deny buttons wired to gates)
Work packet status tracking in OperatorPanel
